parameters: A strong enemy is enshrined here. Will you take on this
You should stay away from that magical organism. If it decides
you're its enemy, it'll kill you.
A group of them appeared and destroyed my village. Now I'm a slave,
and I'm being forced to help raise them.
One day, I swear I'll find their weakness! Even if it costs me my life!
Y-You took down that magical organism!? The evil monster that
Thank you! It won't bring back those who died, but you've brought
me great comfort! Please, take this as thanks!
I would've done anything to take that creature down. No matter
how dangerous the group, I would've joined it.
Looking back on it now though, I was in a pretty dangerous spot.
I almost joined up with enemies of the Empire.
You saved not just my life but my future. Thank you.
*Pant* *Pant*... A large number of supplies were brought in
If we don't get them sorted right away, the soldiers will punish us.
None of these books are of any use.
Every day I have to clean Tortas Palace... Every day I have to suck
What kind of life is this? Will I ever get used to it?
I don't know who you are, but I saw you fighting in the palace earlier.
Both the guards and the domesticated monsters are weak to water.
Do you have a weapon with that attribute?
A-Are you the reason the King of Tortas suddenly cleaned up his act?
None of these books are of any use.
Lily Killer! Stop disappearing into thin air, you murderer!
We're not letting you get away!
